description: 运维 / 平台触发 cancel(POST /internal/tasks/{id}/cancel)→ SDK 下次 renew 收到 cancelRequested=true → 通过 CancellationSignal 等价机制中止 handler。最大延迟 = leaseRenewInterval(默认 60s,无更快反向 push)

then.sdkExpectedAction: set CancellationSignal for taskId=12345 (handler must poll signal in long loops); handler returns SdkTaskResult.cancelled() (or equivalent KILLED/CANCELLED errorCode); SDK reports with errorCode='CANCELLED', success=false, failureClass='TERMINAL_USER'
sdkMustNot: force terminate handler thread (give handler chance to clean up)
ignore cancelRequested (would waste compute until lease expires)
